get.description: Get list of templates by location

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: Folder to list templates from. Use 'root' for top-level listing.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Whether to include templates, folders, or both in the response. `templates` will return only templates, `folders` will return only folders, and `all` will return both.

info.title: Email API v3
info.description:
Documentation for emails API

## API Version v3

All APIs available via `/v3` route prefix with AIP-compliant responses.

bearer.name: Authorization
bearer.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account (OR) Private Integration Token of Sub-Account.

Location-Access.name: Authorization
Location-Access.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account (OR) Private Integration Token of Sub-Account.

Location-Access-Only.name: Authorization
Location-Access-Only.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account.

Agency-Access.name: Authorization
Agency-Access.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Agency (OR) Private Integration Token of Agency.

Agency-Access-Only.name: Authorization
Agency-Access-Only.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Agency.

statusCode.description: HTTP status code for invalid location access

message.description: Error message describing the location access failure
message.example: The token does not have access to this location

statusCode.description: HTTP status code for not found

message.description: Error message describing the not found failure

error.example: The requested resource was not found

elements.description: Array of VNode elements representing the email structure

attrs.description: Object mapping element IDs to their attributes and styles

versionId.description: version id of the saved template

locationId.description: Location ID where the template belongs

updatedBy.description: User ID who is updating the template

editorContent.description: Editor content - can be HTML string, plain text string, or DND builder object depending on editorType. When editorType is "html" or "text", this should be a string. When editorType is "builder", this should be a DND object with elements, attrs, and templateSettings. Must be provided together with editorType.

editorType.description: Type of editor content: "html" for HTML content, "text" for plain text content, "builder" for drag-and-drop builder content. Must be provided together with editorContent.

previewText.description: Preview text shown in email clients before opening

fieldDefaults.description: Field-level default values for custom variables in template fields (fromName, subjectLine, previewText)

ok.description: Indicates if the update was successful

builderVersion.description: Builder version used for the template

previewText.description: Preview text shown in email clients

previewUrl.description: URL to preview the rendered template

isPlainText.description: Whether the template contains plain text content (true) or HTML content (false)

fieldDefaults.description: Field-level default values for custom variables in template fields

attrs.description: Builder attributes map keyed by element ID

templateSettings.description: Template-level settings map keyed by setting group

editorType.description: Editor type for the new template. Use `html` for code-editor templates or `text` for plain-text templates.

editorContent.description: Optional initial editor content. Provide HTML or plain-text string content.

userId.description: ID of the user performing this action
ID of the user performing this action
ID of the user performing this action

items.description: List of template and folder resources

total.description: Total count of templates and folders

editorContentUrl.description: URL to fetch the rendered template content as HTML. Issue a GET against this URL to retrieve the body.

deleted.description: Whether the template was deleted successfully

editorContent.description: Editor content to update. Required only when updating template content, and must be provided together with editorType. Provide HTML or plain-text string content.

editorType.description: Type of editor content. Required only when updating template content, and must be provided together with editorContent.

parentFolderId.description: Parent folder ID. Pass `null` to move template to the root level.

userId.description: ID of the user performing this action

accepted.description: Emails accepted by the mail server

openRate.description: Open rate as percentage of delivered

clickRate.description: Click rate as percentage of delivered

unsubscribeRate.description: Unsubscribe rate as percentage of delivered

complaintRate.description: Complaint rate as percentage of delivered

bounceRate.description: Bounce rate as percentage of sent

replyRate.description: Reply rate as percentage of delivered

total.description: Total count of bulk action campaigns

editorType.description: Editor type for the campaign content. Use `html` for code-editor campaigns or `text` for plain-text campaigns.

templateId.description: Existing template ID to create the campaign from. Omit this field to create a blank campaign.

editorContent.description: Optional initial editor content to persist immediately after campaign creation. Provide HTML or plain-text string content.

userId.description: ID of the user performing this action

userName.description: Name of the user performing this action

sourceId.description: Variation source ID for stats lookup

isWinner.description: Whether this is the winning variation

variations.description: AB test variation identifiers (available only for AB test campaigns)
AB test variation identifiers (available only for AB test campaigns)

editorContent.description: Editor content to update. Required only when updating campaign content, and must be provided together with editorType. Provide HTML or plain-text string content.

editorType.description: Editor type for campaign content. Required only when updating campaign content, and must be provided together with editorContent.

userId.description: ID of the user performing this action

variations.description: AB test variation identifiers (available only for AB test campaigns)
AB test variation identifiers (available only for AB test campaigns)

editorType.description: Original editor type the campaign was created with

isPlainText.description: Whether the campaign uses plain text

editorContentUrl.description: URL to fetch the rendered campaign content as HTML. Issue a GET against this URL to retrieve the body.

id.description: Sub-source identifier (workflow step). Pass this value as the `subSourceId` query parameter on the campaign stats endpoint to retrieve stats scoped to this step.

isPlainText.description: Whether this step uses plain text

editorContentUrl.description: URL to fetch the rendered step content as HTML. Issue a GET against this URL to retrieve the body.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this step was added to the workflow

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this step was last updated

subSources.description: Sub-sources (email-sending steps) within this workflow. Each entry's `id` can be passed as the `subSourceId` query parameter to the campaign stats endpoint to retrieve per-step stats.

total.description: Total count of bulk action campaigns

isPlainText.description: Whether the campaign uses plain text

editorContentUrl.description: URL to fetch the rendered campaign content as HTML. Issue a GET against this URL to retrieve the body.

previewText.description: Preview text shown in inbox after subject

contactIds.description: Contact IDs to send to. Required when type is contact.

tagIds.description: Tag IDs to filter recipients by. Required when type is tag.

segment.description: Segment type for pre-built segments. Required when type is segment.

freezeList.description: Freeze the contact list at schedule time — new matching contacts will not be added later

batchSize.description: Number of contacts to process per batch

enabled.description: Enable resend to contacts who did not open

waitHours.description: Hours to wait before resending. Required when enabled is true.

subject.description: Override subject line for the resend email

sendAt.description: Date/time to send. Required for scheduled, batch, and smart_send. Ignored for immediate.

batch.description: Batch/drip configuration. Required when scheduleType is batch. Ignored otherwise.

resend.description: Auto-resend to contacts who did not open

emailPreferenceId.description: Email preference type ID for categorizing this campaign

repeatAfter.description: How often to check the feed

rssFeedLimit.description: Max number of RSS items per email

startAtDay.description: Day of week for weekly RSS

startAtMonthDay.description: Day of month for monthly RSS

testDuration.description: Seconds to run the test before picking a winner

testSize.description: Percentage of contacts in the test group (0-100)

userId.description: ID of the user performing this action

userName.description: Name of the user performing this action

emailMeta.description: Email subject, sender, and content metadata

recipients.description: Who receives the email. Must provide either contactIds or filter.

sendDays.description: Days of the week to allow sending. Used for batch and RSS scheduleTypes.

scheduleConfig.description: Schedule configuration for immediate, scheduled, batch, and smart_send types. Required when scheduleType is not rss.

rssConfig.description: RSS feed configuration. Required when scheduleType is rss.

abTestConfig.description: A/B test configuration. Can be combined with any scheduleType except rss.

sourceId.description: Source ID for fetching campaign statistics

deleted.description: Whether the campaign was deleted successfully
